name: trashlab-th
comment:optionalDependencies: Linux x64 (glibc) native binaries for the build toolchains: Tailwind v4 (oxide + lightningcss) used by `next build`, and the Storybook/vite8 chain (rolldown, oxc, unrs-resolver, esbuild) used by `build-storybook`. npm only records the host platform's optional binary in the lockfile (npm/cli#4828), so Vercel (linux-x64) lacks these and builds fail loading the native binding. Pinned to the resolved parent versions — bump each together with its parent on upgrade.
